concerns.text: FR-010 requires excluding or marking as 'unclassifiable' knots with ambiguous alternating/non-alternating classification. No task explicitly implements this handling. T043 only addresses missing_invariant_flags (FR-009), not ambiguous classification (FR-010). SC-006 has the same coverage gap.

T038/T039 implement 'combined complexity metric visualization and interpretation' but no corresponding FR exists in spec.md. FR-004 only specifies scatter plots (crossing number vs. braid index). These tasks reference Dan Rockmore review comments that were not formalized into FRs.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) and Principle V (Versioning Discipline) are marked PASS in plan.md but no tasks implement citation validation or content hashing. Constitution principles require implementation tasks from 'specified' stage onward per FR-030.
